privileged_info_summary: The task involves renaming a document in ArkCase (an open-source case management platform) from 'scan_20240315' (type 'Other') to 'Response_Letter_March2025' (type 'Correspondence'). All document values are synthetic: a dummy PDF with test content is created programmatically via ArkCase REST API during setup. The initial document name is 'scan_20240315' and type is 'Other'; the target name is 'Response_Letter_March2025' and target type is 'Correspondence'. Case ID is generated dynamically during setup. No external datasets are used.
